scripts.build: npm -w @spillorama/shared-types run build && npm -w @spillorama/game-client run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.build:games: npm -w @spillorama/shared-types run build && npm -w @spillorama/game-client run build
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run build && npm run test:compliance && npm run check:unity
